faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Passaic typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the treatment method required. faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Passaic homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Passaic can be completed in 4-8 hours for an average-sized home. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination of any newly hatched bed bugs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and methods, including heat treatment options that use no chemicals at all. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure the safety of your family and pets throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We stand behind our bed bug treatments with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period (typically 30-90 days depending on treatment type), we'll re-treat your Passaic property at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination and your peace of mind.
